About
The analyst
behind the work.
12
Projects
completed

I am Usungobong Daniel Udofia, a data analyst and scientist based in Nigeria. I operate under the name themedanalyst.

It started with mathematics. A deep, early love for how numbers describe the world led through a clinical degree in Radiography and straight into data, where I found the same satisfaction: making the invisible visible. My clinical background means I understand health data from both sides of the table, not just the spreadsheet.

I work with SQL, Python, Tableau, Power BI, and Excel to clean messy datasets, build predictive models, and design dashboards that non-technical teams can actually use. Outside work: chess, music that earns its runtime, and a running interest in the mathematics behind everything.

Education
B.Sc. Radiography & Radiological Science, University of Calabar, 2025

Projects
Work that speaks.
Filter by tool or domain. Links open GitHub repos.
Hospital Performance & Patient Care Analytics
SQL + Tableau

Healthcare operations · Patient outcomes · DAMA reduction

End-to-end analytics pipeline covering patient demographics, chronic illness prevalence, DAMA trends, and physician performance. The dashboard gave hospital administrators a clear view of care gaps and high-risk patient groups, informing targeted follow-up strategies.

  • CTEs, window functions, CASE WHEN logic for multi-dimensional segmentation
  • Recommendations projected to reduce DAMA cases by 15 to 20 percent
  • Executive Tableau dashboard designed for non-technical stakeholders
SQLTableauHealthcareDAMA Analysis
GitHub ↗
Pharmacy Revenue & Profitability Analysis
Tableau

Healthcare finance · NHIS vs non-NHIS · Inventory optimisation

Analysed a hospital pharmacy's revenue streams, profit margins, and dispensing patterns. The analysis surfaced loss-making medicines and structural pricing gaps that had gone unnoticed, giving pharmacy management concrete data to prioritise stock and cut revenue leakage.

  • Identified loss-making inventory items and pricing inefficiencies
  • Projected 10 to 15 percent reduction in pharmacy revenue leakage
  • NHIS vs non-NHIS performance split into a single comparative view
TableauPharmacyNHISRevenue Analysis
GitHub ↗
Genetic Disorder Prediction Model
Python · ML

Clinical decision support · Predictive modelling · Early diagnosis

Machine learning pipeline on a clinical genetics dataset to predict patient disorder status, supporting clinicians in flagging high-risk patients earlier. Particularly relevant in under-resourced settings where specialist referrals are delayed.

  • Compared SVM, Random Forest, and Decision Tree classifiers on accuracy and recall
  • Full EDA with feature correlation heatmaps and missing-value treatment
  • Best model selected based on deployment viability in low-resource settings
PythonScikit-learnSVMRandom ForestEDA
GitHub ↗
Insurance Denied Claims Prediction
Python · ML

Insurance operations · Revenue protection · Claims processing

Classification model to identify insurance claims likely to be denied before submission, turning a reactive process into a preventive one. Gives claims teams the ability to correct errors or add documentation proactively before payer review.

  • Feature-engineered clinical and administrative variables for classification
  • Model output designed as actionable flags, not raw probabilities
  • Applicable to both payer-side and provider-side claims workflows
PythonClassificationInsuranceHealthcare Finance
GitHub ↗
Ames Housing Price Regression
Python · Regression

Real estate · Predictive modelling · Feature engineering

Applied regression modelling to the Ames Housing dataset across 79 explanatory variables to predict residential property sale prices. Demonstrates the full data science workflow from raw messy data through to a validated, deployable prediction model.

  • Handled multicollinearity, outliers, and high-cardinality categorical encoding
  • Compared linear, ridge, lasso, and tree-based regression approaches
  • Validated with cross-validation to prevent overfitting
PythonScikit-learnRegressionFeature Engineering
GitHub ↗
NovaCare Insurance Claims Analysis Team Lead
SQL · Python · Power BI

Insurance denial analysis · Revenue leakage · CFO-level reporting

Led a team to investigate a 40 percent claims denial rate for NovaCare Health Insurance across 6,000 raw records. Full pipeline: SQL data cleaning in PostgreSQL, Python EDA and denial risk flagging, and a 3-page Power BI dashboard structured around the CFO's three questions on scale, concentration, and cost.

  • Quantified $5.58M total claim leakage with 92 to 96 percent recoverable
  • Built denial risk flag using evidence-based risk factors per claim
  • Dashboard navigable by non-technical CFO in under 5 minutes
SQLPythonPower BIPostgreSQLDAX
GitHub ↗
Hospital Patient Flow Dashboard Team Lead
Power BI · SQL

Hospital operations · Patient flow pressure · Executive storytelling

Led the communication phase of a hospital patient flow analysis, translating SQL findings on admissions, length of stay, discharge outcomes, and peak timing into a 6-visual Power BI dashboard for leadership. Built to answer one question: where is our hospital under pressure?

  • 6-section dashboard covering inflow, LOS, discharge outcomes, timing, and synthesis
  • Emergency and Orthopedics flagged as highest priority for intervention
  • 1-page executive summary written for hospital leadership, not analysts
Power BISQLDAXHealthcare
GitHub ↗
Hospital Operations Intelligence
Power BI · SQL

Healthcare operations · Readmission risk · Leadership reporting

Translated 10 hospital performance metrics into a visual analytics report for executive leadership. Key finding: the hospital discharges patients within 3 days across all departments but pairs this with a 61.44 percent readmission rate, a major red flag suggesting premature discharge.

  • 61.44 percent readmission rate identified as primary operational risk signal
  • Average LOS under 3 days across all departments despite high severity caseload
  • Narrative report written to accompany visual findings
Power BISQLHealthcareData Storytelling
GitHub ↗
Retail Sales Profitability Analysis
Power BI

Retail finance · Margin analysis · Product-level decision support

Analysed 2.17 million pounds in retail revenue to surface a critical finding: a 1.7 percent profit margin masking significant risk, with majority revenue concentrated in low-margin and loss-generating categories. Built for management with margin band segmentation and subcategory volatility.

  • Revenue strong at 2.17M but margin critically low at 1.7 percent
  • Smaller orders generate more profit than bulk orders, a key pricing insight
  • Negative-margin subcategories flagged for review
Power BIDAXRetailProfitability Analysis
GitHub coming soon
Cost of Living: Urban vs Rural Africa
Power BI · Excel

African financial inclusion · Household economics · Savings behaviour

Analysed 5,786 African households to compare income, expenditure, savings, and financial stress across urban and rural settings. Examined whether mobile money access improves savings behaviour and what patterns emerge across education and occupation levels.

  • Urban households earn more but carry higher financial stress index
  • Food accounts for 36 percent of household expenses, the largest single category
  • Correlation between mobile money access and savings rate examined
Power BIExcelAfricaFinancial Inclusion
GitHub ↗
Health Risk Assessment Dashboard
Power BI · DAX

Clinical analytics · Lifestyle risk profiling · Organ damage prediction

Built a 5-page health risk assessment dashboard exploring organ damage, lifestyle risk factors, and patient segmentation. Answers questions like which organs are most affected by smoking and which patient segments require immediate intervention, using 25 advanced DAX measures.

  • 5-page dashboard: Executive summary, Organ analysis, Lifestyle risk, Patient profiler, Predictive insights
  • Composite health score, smoking damage correlation, family history impact measures
  • Row-level security and What-If parameters for scenario analysis
Power BIDAXHealthcareRisk ScoringRLS

Day Networks Telecom Analytics
SQL · Power BI

Telecommunications · Revenue optimisation · Fraud detection · Customer churn

End-to-end analytics initiative for a Tier-1 Nigerian telecom provider. Full pipeline from PostgreSQL data engineering through to a multi-dashboard Power BI suite covering revenue, customer retention, network performance, and fraud detection, built for executive consumption.

  • Built SQL views for compliance status, orphaned invoices, and agent ROI
  • ARPU, churn rate, CLV, and collection rate dashboards for C-level teams
  • Fraud alert correlation analysis and subscription churn segmentation
